usage_rules.headings: Use 'Unbounded' for all H1-H3. Weight: 700/900. Tracking: tight (-0.02em). Uppercase for small labels.
usage_rules.body: Use 'Manrope' for all paragraphs. Weight: 400/500. Leading: relaxed.
usage_rules.numbers: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for countdowns, prices, and ticket numbers to convey data precision.

glassmorphism.default: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
glassmorphism.heavy: backdrop-filter: blur(24px); background: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.8); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);

borders.tracing_beam: Use a moving gradient border for featured cards.

grid_systems.competitions: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8
grid_systems.bento_hero: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

Navbar.style: Floating pill shape, glassmorphism, fixed top-4, z-50.
Navbar.interaction: Links glow blue on hover. Active state has a bottom glow line.

HeroSection.style: Full viewport height (min-h-[80vh]). Immersive background image with heavy bottom fade gradient to blend into body.
elements: Subtext: 'Premium competitions. Verified winners. Instant payouts.' (Manrope, xl, text-slate-300)

CompetitionCard.style: Glass background, 1px border (slate-800). Hover: Border becomes Blue-500, slight lift, shadow-neon-blue.

variants.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-cyan-500 text-white font-bold rounded-full hover:shadow-neon-blue transition-all
variants.secondary: bg-slate-800 text-white border border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-700 rounded-full
variants.gold: bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-500 to-amber-600 text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:shadow-neon-gold

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons (Trophy, Ticket, User, ShoppingCart, Search, Menu, X).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Replace the existing 'neon' colors in `tailwind.config.js` and `index.css` with the new Blue/Cyan/Gold palette defined above. REMOVE all pink/magenta references.
2. REFACTOR NAVBAR: Convert the navbar to a floating glass pill. Ensure it is responsive (hamburger menu on mobile).
3. MODERNIZE CARDS: Update the competition card component to use the new glassmorphism and hover effects.
4. IMPLEMENT HERO: Build a new Hero section using the 'hero_bg' image and the specified typography.
5. ENSURE DARK MODE: The app should be locked to Dark Mode (or default to it). Ensure text contrast is high (Slate-300 for body, White for heads).
6. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.
7. REMOVE OLD CSS: Clean up unused 'toxic green' or 'hot pink' classes from `index.css`.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and bento grids.
Micro-interactions: Every button must scale (0.98) on click. Every card must lift on hover.
Spacing: Use 'gap-8' or 'p-8' where you would normally use '4'. Give content room to breathe.
Gradients: Use gradients for ACTIONS (buttons, progress bars), not for backgrounds (keep backgrounds deep solid/noise).
Glassmorphism: Use it for containers on top of images. Ensure borders are visible (1px white/10).
